catalysts.description: Burger King’s CEO trolls McDonald’s after the Big Arch rollout, firing back with a Whopper bite that reignites classic fast-food corporate warfare.

catalysts.title: Bettors wagered $54 million on Khamenei’s death. Now they’re not getting paid. - The Washington Post
catalysts.description: Kalshi, a prediction market site, has sparked outrage after freezing $54 million in bets on the death of Iranian leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, citing a rule against profiting from death.

catalysts.description: Amazon is facing cloud computing disruptions in the Middle East after drone strikes affected three data centers.

catalysts.title: Downdetector and Speedtest sold to Accenture for $1.2 billion - The Verge
catalysts.description: Accenture has reached a deal to purchase Ookla’s platforms, including Downdetector and Speedtest, from Ziff Davis for $1.2 billion.

catalysts.title: Homebuyers have another thing to worry about. This time, it's 'housefishing.' - Business Insider
catalysts.description: There's a fine line between helping a buyer imagine a home's potential and deceiving them with AI enhanced photos. Welcome to the "housefishing" era.

catalysts.description: The Dow Industrials ended Tuesday's session down just over 400 points. The 30-stock index curtailed its losses after falling more than 1,200 points at the low.

catalysts.title: Coinbase leads crypto stocks higher after Trump signals support for digital asset market structure bill - CNBC

catalysts.title: Chick-fil-A changes fry recipe - WSB-TV
